caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with expressive gestures, indicating an animated discussion or interview. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional setting for sharing ideas or stories.
